title: Document takt run quiescence loop and --max-cycles flag
description: Update `CLAUDE.md` to document the quiescence loop behaviour and the `--max-cycles` flag. Add a brief subsection under (or extending) the existing 'Multi-Worker CLI Output' section. The Quick Reference line 9 (`run all beads to quiescence`) is already correct — leave it unchanged. The new subsection should describe: (1) takt run loops until the scheduler finds nothing to dispatch; (2) --max-cycles N caps iterations (default 50; 0 = unbounded); (3) beads stuck on unsatisfied dependencies (deferred) cause the loop to exit, not spin — they require operator intervention.
acceptance_criteria: CLAUDE.md contains a subsection or paragraph documenting the quiescence loop behaviour.
The `--max-cycles` flag is documented with its default (50) and the unbounded behaviour for 0.
The deferred-beads exit condition is documented (loop exits, not infinite).
The Quick Reference line 9 is unchanged.
No other CLAUDE.md content is altered.
conflict_risks:
None — only parser.py modified; no overlap with other in-progress beads.
None — only `run.py` was modified; no overlap with other beads.
None — only `src/agent_takt/cli/commands/run.py` was modified, no shared files.
None — only file touched is `tests/test_cli_run.py`, which is not claimed by any other in-progress bead.
